title: Login button not working
description: Users cannot click the login button on the homepage.

title: Missing invoice email
description: Customer not receiving invoice emails after payment.

title: Dashboard crash on load
description: The admin dashboard crashes immediately on load for some users.

title: Feature request: dark mode
description: Customer requests a dark mode option for the app UI.

title: Unable to reset password
description: Password reset link leads to a 404 error.

title: Mobile app crash
description: App crashes on Android 11 when opening profile page.

title: Incorrect billing total
description: Invoices show incorrect totals for international customers.

title: Search not returning results
description: Search function fails to return any results for known keywords.

title: Broken link in FAQ
description: Link to refund policy in FAQ is broken.

title: SMedium loading time
description: Website loading takes too long on mobile devices.

title: App notifications not working
description: Users do not receive push notifications.

title: Language settings reset
description: User language preference resets to default after logout.

title: Error 500 on submit
description: Form submission causes a server error.

title: Report export fails
description: PDF export of reports fails with unknown error.
